subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story of Rakesh and the cherry tree
Learn the importance of patience and care in nurturing nature
Identify the main characters and events in the story
Understand the challenges faced by the young cherry tree
Recognize how perseverance helps living things grow and survive
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Nature and Planting Trees
topics_covered: Importance of trees in our lives
Planting seeds and caring for plants
student_activities: Share experiences of planting or caring for plants

lesson_plan.title: Background of the Story
topics_covered: Introduction to Rakesh and his grandfather
The cherry seed and the garden
student_activities: Read the opening part of the story

lesson_plan.title: Growth of the Cherry Tree
student_activities: Arrange events in the correct order
Explain how the seed began to grow

lesson_plan.title: Challenges Faced by the Tree
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of the conflict in the story
student_activities: Discuss how the tree survived the damage

lesson_plan.title: Blossoms and Realisation
topics_covered: Rakesh and his grandfather admiring the tree
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of the story’s message
student_activities: Describe how Rakesh felt seeing the tree grow
Write the lesson learned from the story

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision Activities
student_activities: Identify new words and their meanings

teacher_tip: Encourage students to discuss how planting a tree can create a special bond with nature. This helps them understand the theme of patience, care, and respect for the environment.
